response.justification: A seasoned generalist engineer (13+ years) with strong full-stack, backend, and infrastructure depth, plus genuine craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, talks/workshops). However, the role demands 8+ years of production-grade AI/GenAI work, and the candidate's relevant AI exposure is limited to ~1 year at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic tooling). There is no evidence of Python, RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/optimization, or designing AI systems on cloud at scale. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of the recent AI work, but a clear gap against the core GenAI requirements.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience across web, backend, mobile, and embedded with strong TypeScript/Node.js
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks, directly matching a key technology
Demonstrated technical leadership and mentorship via workshops, talks, courses, and open-source platform ownership
concerns: Lacks the required 8+ years of production AI solutions; AI experience is recent and shallow
No evidence of Python, RAG, vector databases, or LLM performance/optimization expertise
No clear customer-facing/forward-deployed or technical discovery experience with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector DB, and Python skills
Strong general engineering and recent MCP/agentic exposure
